<!--
  PR title MUST follow Conventional Commits:
    feat: ... | fix: ... | chore: ... | docs: ... | refactor: ... | etc.

  Only the PR title is used for changelog generation. Commit messages
  within the branch are free-form because we squash-merge.
-->
